name: sparql_execute
description: Execute a SPARQL query against the knowledge graph endpoint

name: kg_schema_lookup
description: Look up schema details for a class or property in the ontology

entity.description: Class or property name to look up (e.g., 'Supplier', 'hasReliabilityScore')

name: result_formatter
description: Format raw SPARQL result bindings into structured JSON

bindings.description: Raw SPARQL result bindings to format

name: query_cache_read
description: Read cached results for a frequently-used parameterized query

query_template.description: Name of the cached query template

parameters.description: Parameters to fill into the template
